# Project Midas

> Project Midas — photometric search for unresolved binaries in M34 (NGC 1039). 3,760 legacy BVR stars, 3,738 Gaia DR3 matches, 263 high-confidence members, 6-catalog explorer. 3/4 research phases complete (85%). Interactive HR diagrams, isochrone gallery, Q-value validation, open pipelines.

## Primary URL
https://midasastronomy.com

## Repository
https://github.com/amne51ac/project-midas

## Cluster
- Object: M34 / NGC 1039 (open cluster, Perseus)
- Distance: ~470 pc
- Reddening: E(B−V) = 0.07

## Data on this site
- Midas photometry: 3,760 stars (800 plotted in HR sample)
- Gaia DR3 matches: 3,738
- Cantat-Gaudin members (P ≥ 0.7): 263
- Gaia field cone: 15,211 sources
- Catalog layers in explorer: 6

## Main sections
- [History](https://midasastronomy.com/#history)
- [Sky / finder chart](https://midasastronomy.com/#sky)
- [Science / HR diagram](https://midasastronomy.com/#science)
- [Data explorer](https://midasastronomy.com/#data)
- [Catalog comparison](https://midasastronomy.com/#compare)
- [Code demos](https://midasastronomy.com/#code)
- [Tools inventory](https://midasastronomy.com/#tools)
- [Roadmap](https://midasastronomy.com/#roadmap)

## Research phases
- [Phase I: Archaeology & reproducibility](https://midasastronomy.com/#/phases/phase-i) — complete; 8/8 tasks
- [Phase II: Gaia integration](https://midasastronomy.com/#/phases/phase-ii) — complete; 8/8 tasks
- [Phase III: Validation](https://midasastronomy.com/#/phases/phase-iii) — complete; 6/6 tasks
- [Phase IV: Synthesis](https://midasastronomy.com/#/phases/phase-iv) — upcoming; 0/4 tasks

## Citation
Project Midas revival (https://midasastronomy.com). M34 (NGC 1039) photometric binary census.
